sections.paragraph:
Original: דּרך

Transliteration: derek

Phonetic: deh'-rek

BDB Definition:

  1. way, road, distance, journey, manner
    1. road, way, path
    2. journey
    3. direction
    4. manner, habit, way
    5. of course of life (figuratively)
    6. of moral character (figuratively)

Origin: from H1869

TWOT entry: 453a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
